name: integration_im_building_a_youtube_intelligence_api_
method: I'm building a YouTube Intelligence API because vidIQ and TubeBuddy have 30M users but zero public API access Hey everyone. I've been deep in the YouTube creator tools space and noticed something wild

phases.name: research_validate
steps: scan RapidAPI for existing YouTube intelligence APIs and their pricing
check YouTube Data API v3 free quota limits and endpoint coverage
identify top 5 data points vidIQ/TubeBuddy users want but cant get via API

phases.name: build_core
steps: build FastAPI service with endpoints: keyword_score, channel_benchmark, video_performance, trending_niches
implement YouTube Data API v3 client with quota management and caching
add rate limiting and API key auth

phases.name: deploy_list
steps: deploy to Railway free tier or Vercel serverless
create RapidAPI listing with free tier (100 calls/day) and paid tiers
generate API docs with example responses

phases.name: distribute
steps: post on r/SideProject r/webdev r/youtube showing the API gap
create 3 tweets about the vidIQ/TubeBuddy API gap with link
submit to Product Hunt as a maker
